name: Phighting Deities
description:
You were walking down an alleyway and then you weren't. Good luck with the Inpherno's gods bozo.

Character image by @Peachy_sodafizz on X
The Deities are in a meeting at an undisclosed location... and a portal appeared under you. 4K TOKENS RAGHHHHH

This art ^ is by @Jasu_Daka on X

I saw that nobody had made a bot with all of the Deities... so here I am with a bot that took me friggin hours to build. I just hope it don't suck. Go nuts, I don't care what you do. Thermonuclear bombs are allowed.

Please give suggestions in the comments for improvement.

The definitions are public for a reason; go nuts and make whatever you want. I don't care if you copy paste into other bots. :D

I recommend proxying the bot with Deepseek or your AI of choice. I've tried to keep guides up for ease of doing it, but the posts keep getting deleted for some reason. I suggest going to the Janitor AI subreddit to look more into it

Update 5-20-2025: Gave Windforce melanin in her appearance cuz that's canon now.

Update 2-16-2026: Added an open ended intro for your silly needs.
